---
title: paper title

pub-authors:
  - list
  - of
  - authors
  - last
  - names
  - only

show-on-profiles:
  - list of pages to show this publication on (e.g., jason-tsukahara)

pub-year: year
date: YYYY-MM-DD
venue: venue full name
pub-type: type of publication (e.g., Journal Article, Book Chapter, Popular Writing)
pub-status: publication status (e.g., Published, In Press, Accepted, Under Review)

project-areas:
  - list of what project areas this publication is related to (e.g., attention control, working memory, language comprehension)

pdf: filename.pdf
data:
code:
doi: ""

abstract: "Paper Abstract"

listing-page: false
format: html
---
